title: invitations — broadcast channels
description: Real-time broadcast channels this module owns. Registered by `InvitationsServiceProvider::registerBroadcastChannels()`. One workspace-scoped channel; carries all state transitions so the admin invitations table can update live without polling.

channels.name: workspace.{workspaceId}.invitations
channels.description: Every InvitationEvent from state transitions broadcasts here. SPA subscribes on the invitations index screen; updates rows without refetching. Batched — a burst of transport signals (100 deliveries in 5s) coalesces to one broadcast per invitation.
channels.authorize: User belongs to the workspace AND has `invitations.viewAny`
